appraisal_events.evidence: « Voilà mon de Robert de Saint-Loup qui s'est amené ... “Je veux qu'il soit bien nourri, ça coûtera ce que ça coûtera.” »
appraisal_events.explanation: Soldiers recount and imitate Saint-Loup ordering that someone be well fed, framing him as generous and effective; the lively imitation meets with success, signaling group admiration.

status_effects.explanation: Locally elevated by the soldiers’ approving anecdote that highlights his care and authority.
